patterns.name: Settings page
patterns.description: A single-column settings/edit form capped to a readable width with a save/cancel action row.
patterns.when: Account settings, profile edits, configuration screens — anywhere a form should not stretch across a wide viewport.
patterns.code:
<pds-container size="md">
  <pds-box direction="column" gap="lg">
    <pds-text tag="h1">Settings</pds-text>

    <pds-box direction="column" gap="md">
      <pds-input label="Name" value="Ada Lovelace"></pds-input>
      <pds-input label="Email" type="email" value="ada@example.com"></pds-input>
      <pds-textarea label="Bio"></pds-textarea>
      <pds-switch label="Email notifications" checked></pds-switch>
    </pds-box>

    <pds-box gap="sm">
      <pds-button variant="primary">Save changes</pds-button>
      <pds-button variant="secondary">Cancel</pds-button>
    </pds-box>
  </pds-box>
</pds-container>
notes: pds-container caps the form width (size="md"); the form itself is a single column, so no pds-row is needed.
direction="column" + gap on pds-box replaces per-field margins.
Form fields use label as a prop (pds-input/pds-textarea/pds-switch) — never a separate <label>.
Primary action first, secondary (cancel) second; grouped in their own gap row.

patterns.name: List page (header + table)
patterns.description: A full-width index page: a heading row with a primary action, above a data table.
patterns.when: Resource index screens (products, members, orders) that show a table with a 'create new' action.
patterns.code:
<pds-container size="full">
  <pds-box direction="column" gap="md">
    <pds-box justify-content="space-between" align-items="center">
      <pds-text tag="h1">Products</pds-text>
      <pds-button variant="primary">
        <pds-icon slot="start" name="add"></pds-icon>
        New product
      </pds-button>
    </pds-box>

    <pds-table component-id="products">
      <pds-table-head>
        <pds-table-head-cell>Name</pds-table-head-cell>
        <pds-table-head-cell>Status</pds-table-head-cell>
        <pds-table-head-cell>Price</pds-table-head-cell>
      </pds-table-head>
      <pds-table-body>
        <pds-table-row>
          <pds-table-cell>Intro to Design</pds-table-cell>
          <pds-table-cell>Published</pds-table-cell>
          <pds-table-cell>$49</pds-table-cell>
        </pds-table-row>
        <pds-table-row>
          <pds-table-cell>Advanced Pine</pds-table-cell>
          <pds-table-cell>Draft</pds-table-cell>
          <pds-table-cell>$99</pds-table-cell>
        </pds-table-row>
      </pds-table-body>
    </pds-table>
  </pds-box>
</pds-container>
notes: Header row uses justify-content="space-between" align-items="center" to push the action to the right.
Table structure: pds-table-head holds pds-table-head-cell directly; pds-table-body holds pds-table-row > pds-table-cell.
Icon-in-button uses slot="start" with a valid icon name (add), not the deprecated icon prop.
size="full" lets the table use the available width.

patterns.name: List page with filters
patterns.description: A list page with a pds-filters bar between the heading and the table.
patterns.when: Index screens that need filtering/segmenting before the table (orders, contacts, transactions).
patterns.code:
<pds-container size="full">
  <pds-box direction="column" gap="md">
    <pds-text tag="h1">Orders</pds-text>

    <pds-filters>
      <pds-filter component-id="status" variant="default" text="Status" icon="switch-vertical"></pds-filter>
      <pds-filter component-id="date" variant="default" text="Date" icon="switch-vertical"></pds-filter>
      <pds-filter component-id="more" variant="more" text="More filters" icon="add-circle"></pds-filter>
      <pds-filter component-id="clear" variant="clear" text="Clear filters"></pds-filter>
    </pds-filters>

    <pds-table component-id="orders">
      <pds-table-head>
        <pds-table-head-cell>Order</pds-table-head-cell>
        <pds-table-head-cell>Customer</pds-table-head-cell>
        <pds-table-head-cell>Status</pds-table-head-cell>
      </pds-table-head>
      <pds-table-body>
        <pds-table-row>
          <pds-table-cell>#1024</pds-table-cell>
          <pds-table-cell>Grace Hopper</pds-table-cell>
          <pds-table-cell>Paid</pds-table-cell>
        </pds-table-row>
      </pds-table-body>
    </pds-table>
  </pds-box>
</pds-container>
notes: pds-filters wraps pds-filter triggers; each pds-filter takes component-id, variant (default | selected | more | clear), text, and an optional icon.
Use variant="more" for the overflow trigger and variant="clear" for reset.
Filters sit in the same column flow as the table, separated by the parent gap — no extra margins.

patterns.name: Confirmation modal
patterns.description: A destructive-action confirmation dialog using modal subcomponents and a footer button pair.
patterns.when: Delete/disable confirmations and other irreversible actions that need an explicit confirm step.
patterns.code:
<pds-modal component-id="delete-confirm" open size="sm">
  <pds-modal-header>Delete product?</pds-modal-header>
  <pds-modal-content>
    <pds-text>This permanently deletes "Intro to Design". This can't be undone.</pds-text>
  </pds-modal-content>
  <pds-modal-footer>
    <pds-button variant="secondary">Cancel</pds-button>
    <pds-button variant="destructive">Delete</pds-button>
  </pds-modal-footer>
</pds-modal>
notes: pds-modal owns open (boolean) and size (sm | md | lg | fullscreen); sm suits confirmations.
Compose with the subcomponents: pds-modal-header, pds-modal-content, pds-modal-footer.
Footer keeps the safe choice (Cancel, secondary) first and the destructive action (variant="destructive") last.
Pair with the delete-confirmation UX standards before wiring the confirm handler.

patterns.name: Empty & loading states
patterns.description: Centered loading and empty states for a content area, using pds-loader and pds-text.
patterns.when: Async content regions and zero-data states for lists, tables, and panels.
patterns.code:
<!-- Loading -->
<pds-box direction="column" align-items="center" gap="sm" padding="xl">
  <pds-loader></pds-loader>
  <pds-text>Loading…</pds-text>
</pds-box>

<!-- Empty -->
<pds-box direction="column" align-items="center" gap="sm" padding="xl">
  <pds-icon name="folder" size="large"></pds-icon>
  <pds-text tag="h3">No products yet</pds-text>
  <pds-text color="--pine-color-text-secondary">Create your first product to get started.</pds-text>
  <pds-button variant="primary">
    <pds-icon slot="start" name="add"></pds-icon>
    New product
  </pds-button>
</pds-box>
notes: Center both states with direction="column" align-items="center" and generous padding.
pds-loader renders a spinner by default (isLoading defaults true); pair with a short pds-text label.
Empty state: a decorative pds-icon (valid name, e.g. folder), a heading, a one-line explanation in a secondary color token, and a primary CTA.
